title: Now I Can See the Lovemeter
overview: Lacking the courage to confess to my childhood friend, Marika, I make a strong wish upon a shooting star. And now, I can see the lovemeters over the girls in my class. Confused by this surreal sight, I look over at Marika, only to find that her meter's had a total meltdown to rotten depths...?! Marika, why is it that you were always so kind to me, then...? What is the real meaning behind the lovemeter...?

title: The Highs and Lows of the Lovemeter
overview: I've got to do something about my crush, Marika's completely broken lovemeter. First, I figured I should get along with Toyotomi, whose lovemeter is low, but she treats me so harshly, I get discouraged quickly. However, after school, when I help a crying girl at the usual park and take her home, it was Toyotomi's house?! Apparently, the girl was Toyotomi's younger sister! As soon as she invites me to have dinner together as thanks, her lovemeter goes up...

title: The Awakening of the Lovemeter
overview: Racking my brains over what to do with Marika's lovemeter, I bump into my classmate, Mikasa, who was walking her dog at the usual park. Being fellow dog-lovers and sparking conversation over them, her lovemeter is high. I try to act uncool in order to lower Mikasa's lovemeter for the sake of my true love, Marika, but on the contrary...?! Unbeknownst to me, Marika, passing by, witnesses the whole thing...
